message:
✨ Add repo/path watching to MissionBrowser, remove duplicate ActiveUsersWidget (#1490)

- Remove ActiveUsersWidget from top navbar (already in sidebar)
- Add localStorage-backed watched repos and file paths to MissionBrowser
- Add '+' buttons next to 'My Repositories' and 'Local Files' for adding sources
- Inline forms for adding owner/repo or file paths with escape-to-cancel
- Watched items shown as tree children with remove (trash) buttons
- Persist watched sources across sessions via localStorage

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
